title: Let Me See See
description: A tool for viewing and freely editing the inventory of any living entity, compatible with accessory slot mods(Curios Api or Trinkets).用于查看并随意修改任意生物物品栏的工具，兼容饰品栏mod
body:
This mod adds a command `/letmecc` and an item tool (`letmecc:let_me_cc`) for viewing and editing the inventory of any living entity. All mobs are granted a default inventory containing main hand, off-hand, and 4 armor slots by default. Furthermore, the inventories of villagers, piglins, and other mobs with native inventory support are also accessible. Compatible with Curios API or Trinkets.

**Important Note: Slot restrictions are ignored for inventories opened through this mod. Therefore, using inventory-sorting mods in this interface is not recommended! Pressing the Delete key in the opened interface will clear the item in the cursor slot.**

Usage for the tool: Right-click a mob to view its inventory. Right-click the air to target the nearest mob. Sneak + Right-click to view your own inventory.

本mod添加了一个指令`/letmecc`以及一个物品形式的工具（`letmecc:let_me_cc`）用于查看和修改任意生物实体的物品栏，所有生物默认拥有主副手和4个盔甲槽，除此之外，村民、猪灵等拥有物品栏的生物也是可以查看的。兼容Curios Api或者Trinkets。

**通过本mod打开的背包的槽位无视原本的物品放置限制，因此不建议在此界面使用物品整理类的mod！在打开的界面按下delete键会清除当前鼠标所在槽位的物品。**

物品工具的使用方法：对着生物右键就查看它的背包，对着空气右键查看最近的生物，潜行右键查看自己。
